description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Nuget that compiles and packages native backends for multiple platforms. The workflow should trigger on a workflow dispatch event with an optional input to publish the package. It should have a build job that runs on multiple operating systems, installs dependencies, builds native backends, processes artifacts, and uploads them. A second job, pack_nuget, should download the artifacts, and then package and upload NuGet packages, conditional on the publish input.
